queries.sql: SELECT `DEMANDE`.`IDDEMANDE` AS `IDDEMANDE`, `DEMANDE`.`IDCLIENT`, `DEMANDE`.`NOM`, `DEMANDE`.`PRENOM`, `DEMANDE`.`EMAIL`, `DEMANDE`.`TEL`, `DEMANDE`.`MARQUE`, `DEMANDE`.`MODELE`, `DEMANDE`.`DATEDEMANDE`, `DEMANDE`.`ETAT`, `LP`.`IMAT` as `IMMATRICULATION`, `LP`.`ANNEE`, `LP`.`NUMCHASSIS` as `CHASSIS`, `CLIENT`.`NUMRANDOM`, `CT`.`DATECT` AS `DATE`, `CT`.`HEURE` AS `HEURE`, `CT`.`CTENCOURS`, `CT`.`IDCT` FROM `DEMANDE` LEFT JOIN `CLIENT` ON `DEMANDE`.`IDCLIENT` = `CLIENT`.`IDCLIENT` LEFT JOIN (SELECT p.* FROM POSSEDE p INNER JOIN (SELECT IDCLIENT, MAX(IDCT) AS max_idct FROM POSSEDE GROUP BY IDCLIENT) last ON last.IDCLIENT = p.IDCLIENT AND last.max_idct = p.IDCT) LP ON LP.IDCLIENT = CLIENT.IDCLIENT LEFT JOIN `CT` ON `CT`.`IDCT` = `LP`.`IDCT` ORDER BY `DEMANDE`.`DATEDEMANDE` ASC
